summary: Monetization & Behavioral Compulsion Engine testing complete. All 45 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI components verified: PricingPage shows 4-tier plans with correct INR pricing, 3 top-up packs, credit costs table. ResumeYourStory compulsion card displays urgency line, next_hook, Continue Episode X CTA. UpgradeModal correctly triggers on 403 with episode limit message. SeriesTimeline ?focus= auto-scrolls and highlights episode. Paywall enforcement working: series creation returns 403 at limit, episode planning returns 403 at 3+ episodes.
critical_code_review_comments: monetization.py: All 4 plans correctly configured with price_usd (0, 5.99, 11.99, 23.99) and limitations (max_series, max_episodes_per_series)
monetization.py: TOOL_CREDIT_COSTS properly defined (caption=1, gif=2, photo_to_comic=3, storybook=5, story_video=10)
monetization.py: get_series_limits() and check_series_limit() correctly return upgrade_message when limit exceeded
story_series.py line 113-118: create endpoint properly calls check_series_limit() and returns 403 with upgrade message
story_series.py line 417-422: plan-episode properly calls check_episode_limit() and returns 403 with upgrade message
story_series.py line 351-368: my-series correctly returns compulsion data (next_episode, episodes_left, next_hook, open_loops_count)
PricingPage.js: Shows 4 plan cards with INR pricing, top-up packs grid, credit costs table, current plan highlighted
ResumeYourStory.jsx: SeriesCompulsionCard shows urgency line, next_hook, Continue Episode X CTA, View Timeline button
UpgradeModal.js: Displays reason-specific messages (episode_limit shows 'Your story is getting interesting', 'You've reached Episode X')
SeriesTimeline.js line 30-31: useSearchParams for focus param, line 65-66: scrollIntoView for auto-focus with ring highlight

test_credentials.test_series_id: ea2bc4e8-454d-4f40-8415-f4383593904a (Fox Forest - 4 episodes, free plan user at limit)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 1 series 'Fox Forest' having 4 episodes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Monetization engine fully tested. Free plan limits (1 series, 3 episodes) verified via 403 responses. Test user has 999,492 credits but is on free plan so series/episode limits still apply. UpgradeModal triggers correctly on 403 from plan-episode endpoint. The series has 4 episodes (1 failed, 3 planned) so episode limit (3 for free) is exceeded. Pricing page shows INR pricing (499/999/1999). Compulsion data (next_hook, open_loops_count, episodes_left) flows from my-series API to ResumeYourStory component.

GET_monetization_plans.evidence: Returns 4 plans with correct pricing: Free $0, Creator $5.99, Pro $11.99, Elite $23.99

GET_monetization_tool_costs.evidence: Returns TOOL_CREDIT_COSTS: caption=1, gif=2, photo_to_comic=3, storybook=5, story_video=10

GET_monetization_my_limits.evidence: Returns plan, credits, series_limits (max_series, max_episodes_per_series), limitations

POST_story_series_create_paywall.evidence: Returns 403 with upgrade message when free user (1 series limit) tries to create 2nd series

POST_plan_episode_paywall.evidence: Returns 403 with 'Episode 4 limit. Upgrade to continue' when free user (3 episode limit) tries to plan episode 5

GET_my_series_compulsion_data.evidence: Returns next_episode, episodes_left, next_hook, open_loops_count for each series

PricingPage_4_tier_cards.evidence: Shows Free, Creator INR 499, Pro INR 999, Elite INR 1999 with features list and Current Plan button

PricingPage_topup_packs.evidence: Shows 3 packs (20/50/100 credits) with POPULAR and BEST VALUE badges

PricingPage_credit_costs_table.evidence: Shows Caption/Text 1 credit, GIF Maker 2 credits, Photo to Comic 3 credits, Comic Storybook 5 credits

ResumeYourStory_compulsion_card.evidence: Shows series with urgency line '4 episodes unfinished', Continue Episode 2 button, View Timeline button

UpgradeModal_on_403.evidence: Modal displays with episode_limit reason: 'Your story is getting interesting', 'You've reached Episode 4', 'Continue the Story' CTA

SeriesTimeline_focus_param.evidence: ?focus=episodeId auto-scrolls and adds ring-1 ring-indigo-500/50 highlight to focused episode card
